item.description:
## What's Changed

- Surface live Cloud processing state immediately after a recording enters post-processing, so locally-started uploads and transcription jobs appear in the Cloud library without waiting for a full remote refresh.
- Prefer the latest known transcription job state over the recording file state in Cloud list rows and details, so queued, running, and failed jobs do not appear as `Ready`.
- Persist known transcription job history in the local Cloud SWR cache for more stable status display across selection changes and restarts.
- Improve manual `Check for Updates…` behavior from the menu bar by bringing Sparkle update UI to the foreground when needed.
- Add larger Now Playing artwork for Cloud playback so macOS Control Center no longer shows a tiny Recappi/source icon.

## Known Limitation

- Full visibility for jobs started from the web app or another client depends on the backend `GET /api/recordings/:id/jobs` endpoint being deployed. The app is ready for that endpoint, but production backend deployment is currently blocked upstream.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `swift test` (71 tests)
- `CODESIGN_IDENTITY=- ./scripts/build-app.sh`
